data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Facilitates easy navigation by optimizing button placement and size for efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Strategic positioning of CTAs and interactive elements.

data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by minimizing choices displayed at one time.
data.technical_spec: Grouping of similar products and filters to streamline choices.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Creates familiarity by adhering to established web conventions.
data.technical_spec: Consistent navigation, layout, and shopping cart experience.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Enhances user understanding by chunking information into digestible bits.
data.technical_spec: Use of logical categories and expandable sections for detailed info.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Focuses on beauty enhancing the perceived usability of the site.
data.technical_spec: High-quality imagery, balanced typography, and white space.
